ops.title: P1: core port (proc/service/version/paths/appgroup/bundle)
ops.description: cp-then-edit lift of fusekit proc/ + service/ + appgroup/, cc-interact version/ + paths/, new bundle/. Normative contracts from the plan §1: CloseInheritedFDs first-op, Wait-goroutine reaping (never Process.Release), LaunchStrategy interface, ctx-first + clock seam, SingleEntrant contract, version taxonomy (Dev-before-triple classification, stat-once), proc.Reaper {pid,start_time,comm,generation}, shared-state TryLock, env hygiene, purego bridge rules, AssociatedBundleIdentifiers in KeepAlive plist (golden-bunny F1). Backoff audit: adopt in Track S or delete. Fan-out: gpt-5.6-sol xhigh ×5 bounded lanes.

ops.text: Per-package goldens + scripts/test.sh green; CGO_ENABLED=0 go build ./... whole-module
Version table test covers release / legacy plain-dev / canonical mtime-dev / same-second rebuilds
